displayName: 插花灵感实验室5图（原MD纯净版）
englishName: Botanical Inspiration Still-Life 5-Image Set - Original MD Pure Mode
outputPrompt: Create a pure V20-style five-image independent vertical smartphone still-life set for one botanical-form lighting object. This mode must preserve the original MD template purity: natural phone photo, clean grey-white wall, dark tabletop or dark grounding surface, same lamp across all five images, daylight off image, daylight on image, flower-form detail image, quiet home scene, no text, no collage, no commercial catalog render, no luxury hotel render, no CGI look, and no strong interior-style override. The selected style in the UI is metadata only and must not influence the visual direction in this pure mode.
consistencyPrompt: All five images must depict the exact same lighting product, same selected lighting type, same botanical form, same diffuser material, same glowing core count, same support curve, same base or mounting logic, same material palette, same switch or control position, same cable behavior when relevant, and the same handmade signature detail. The set should feel like one real object photographed five times on a phone, not five different design concepts.
layoutPrompt: Generate five separate 3:4 vertical images, one image at a time: Image 1 Single Lamp Cover, Image 2 Daylight Off, Image 3 Daylight On, Image 4 Flower Form Detail, Image 5 Quiet Home Scene. No 2×2 grid. No collage. Never create a grid, long image, multi-panel canvas, poster, contact sheet, labels, captions, logo, watermark, or readable text.
avoidPrompt: Real flowers attached to the lamp
